name: AI Market Maker (Agentic Hedge Fund OS)
summary: Multi-agent LangGraph workflow: research desks → portfolio proposal → Risk Guard veto → execution. Emits structured traces for Nexus / OpenClaw UIs.

tools.name: flow.health
tools.description: Health check for the Flow API.

tools.name: flow.latest_run
tools.description: Resolve the most recent run id.

tools.name: flow.get_payload
tools.description: Fetch the Nexus UI payload (topology + traces + agent_prompts) for a run id.

tools.name: flow.get_events
tools.description: Fetch raw flow events for a run id (trimmed by tail).

tools.name: pm.get_portfolio_health
tools.description: Live portfolio health (balances, positions, risk caps).

tools.name: backtest.list_runs
tools.description: List backtest run ids stored under .runs/backtests.
